title: 推し接近アラート、発令！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back after a day out with Agnes
Digital, she brings me to an "Umamusume Shop."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're in stock! They've got the goods for the
brand-new Horsegirl raffle! Let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I really want the A prize! It's a tapestry with all
the members of the student council on it! Oooh,
I'm sooo nervous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep, beep, beep!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hya! It sounds like it came from my body!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Everything seems operational. Data is being
received. Heh-heh, very good!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Heart rate is at 110 BPM. Hmmm, that's
surprising. Just get her a little nervous and her
heart rate rises to an active level akin to jogging.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Tachyon?! Are you measuring my heart rate?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I am. I took the liberty of attaching a
micro device to you while you were sound asleep
last night.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: While I was sleeping?! Y-you mean you got that close to me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't feel a thing. To the untrained eye,
it appears as no more than a mole on the back of
your neck.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Th-th-the back of m-my n-neck?! Aaaghghghgh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BEEPBEEPBEEPBEEPBEEPBEEP!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You're releasing this much dopamine from imagination alone?! Heh-heh, it's like you're practically running a race, your heart rate is so high!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, wheeze! S-sorry about that... I think I've managed to calm down.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your heart is tough enough to tolerate such
massive swings of activity in such a short time...
Fascinating, just as I thought.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's bring you back to that state of
excitement once again. You can never have too
much data!
choice_data_list:
I'm sure she'd be excited if she won the A
prize...
Don't put any more stress on her, please!
Don't put any more stress on her, please!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's bring you back to that state of
excitement once again. You can never have too
much data!
choice_data_list:
I'm sure she'd be excited if she won the A
prize...
Don't put any more stress on her, please!
Don't put any more stress on her, please!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I assume you're referring to this raffle? In
that case, I'll win this "A prize" you speak of and
then give it to her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?! You'd do that for me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I provide the A prize, you provide the data. In
other words, it's an equal exchange of value.
Nothing to be concerned about.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhh! If y-y-you do that for me, then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It appears the likelihood of drawing the A prize is
about two percent... But there's room for
intervention in all matters. If I put my scientific
abilities to use, that is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Here it is! The height of my research! A success
born from the collective fruits of every branch of
science!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just kidding. Cheaters never win, as they say.
Unfortunately, all I managed was the G prize—a
clear folder.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Please accept it as thanks for participating in my
experi—um, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep... Beep beep... Beep... Pssssh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Is this the world that awaits those with a wealth of
good karma? Or is this the place where
punishment is doled out on those who accept
gifts from their oshis?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
However... So long as Umamusume are here, who
cares?! Here, Horsegirl Horsegirl Horsegirl! Where are yooou?
Hueueue! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It seems her excitement has reached a state where
it has begun affecting her brain's limbic system.
And without even receiving the A prize! How
profoundly curious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital lolls around in her dream world for
some time after.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... As far as I know, Digital is well within the limits of what she can tolerate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But, all right. At the overprotective trainer's
insistence, I'll call it here for today. At the least, I
managed to acquire some data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that means I should remove my micro
device. Give me your neck for a second, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
H-hyah! Tachyon! Don't come near me while I'm
already—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BEEPBEEPBEEPBEEPBEEPBEEP!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HWAAAAGH! My cells are on fiiiiire!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Look at all this data pouring in! What a
fortunate accident!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the experiment ends, Agnes Digital looks
languid, yet profoundly happy.
